name: IntraProp
tagline: AI-powered real estate platform with property matching and notifications
description: An intelligent real estate management platform that uses OpenAI Assistants for automated property matching, zone analysis, and budget evaluation. Features property listing management with data import from CSV/XLSX, AI-powered search and recommendations via pgvector embeddings, automated email notifications for matching properties, and a custom code generator for rapid CRUD scaffolding.
highlights: Multiple OpenAI Assistants for property matching, zone analysis, and budgeting
RAG with pgvector embeddings for intelligent property search
Automated notification system for property matches via email
Data import from CSV/XLSX with property validation
Custom code generator for rapid CRUD scaffolding from Prisma models
